source_string: Must be an opped player in creative mode
Command blocks are not enabled on this server
translation: Stýriboðskubbar eru ikki gildugir á hesum ambætara

source_string: Note! When you sign the book, it will no longer be editable.
translation: GG! Skrivar tú undir í bókina, kann hon ikki broytast aftur.

source_string: Height limit for building is %s blocks
Are you sure you want to open the following website?
translation: Vilt tú veruliga lata hesa vevsíðu upp?

source_string: Do you want to open this link or copy it to your clipboard?
translation: Vilt tú lata leinkið upp ella avrita til setiborðið?

source_string: Never open links from people that you don't trust!
translation: Lat aldrin leinki upp frá fólki, tú ikki hevur álit á!

source_string: You have entered an invalid IP address or a player that is not online
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a maximum of %2$d
Custom bossbar [%1$s] has no players currently online
translation: Tillagaði stjórastigin %s hevur í løtuni ongar leikarar á netinum

source_string: Custom bossbar [%1$s] has a value of %2$d
translation: Tillagað bossbarr %s hevur nú virði á %s

source_string: Could not de-op (permission level too high): %s
translation: Einki er broytt. Leikarin er ikki ein umsitari

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, %3$s, %4$s (%5 blocks away)
translation: The nearest %s is at %s (%s blocks away)

source_string: The nearest %1$s is at block %2$s, (y?), %3$s (%4 blocks away)
Could not op (already op or higher): %s
translation: Einki er broytt. Leikarin er longu ein umsitari

source_string: Function and script files have been reloaded.
There are no objectives on the scoreboard
There are no tracked players on the scoreboard

translation: Set spawn point to %s, %s, %s [%s] in %s for %s

source_string: Target either already has the tag or has too many tags
translation: Antin hevur málið longu frámerkið, ella hevur tað ov nógv frámerki

source_string: Target does not have this tag
Failed to connect to the server

translation: Hetta fer at skriva yvir núverandi
stillingar, og kann tá ikki bakkast.
Serliga víðkaðir stillingar (Bert fyri royndar spælarar!)

source_string: Alternatively, here's some we made earlier!
translation: Um ikki, so er her okkurt, vit longu hava gjørt!

source_string: Want to share your preset with someone? Use the below box!
translation: Vilt tú deila undanstillingina við onkran? Brúka kassan niðanfyri!

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling anvil
%1$s walked into a cactus whilst trying to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s gekk inn í ein kaktus á veg undan %2$s

source_string: %1$s was squashed by a falling block

translation: %1$s gekk inn í eld í bardaga við %2$s

source_string: %1$s tried to swim in lava to escape %2$s
translation: %1$s royndi at svimja í lava fyri at flýggja frá %2$s

source_string: %1$s was burnt to a crisp whilst fighting %2$s
translation: %1$s brann til øsku í bardaga við %2$s
%1$s doyði, tá ið hann royndi at skaða %2$s
%1$s var bankað/ur í hel av %2$s við %3$s

source_string: %1$s was skewered by a falling stalactite
%1$s was doomed to fall by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s var dømdur at detta av %2$s við %3$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s
translation: %1$s datt ov langt og var dripin av %2$s

source_string: %1$s fell too far and was finished by %2$s using %3$s
translation: %1$s datt ov langt og var dripin av %2$s við %3$s

source_string: Are you sure you want to quit?
This demo will last five game days, do your best!
translation: Sýnisroyndin varar fimm dagar. Royn títt besta!

source_string: You have passed your fifth day, use F2 to save a screenshot of your creation
translation: Tú ert farin um fimta dagin. Brúka %s fyri at taka eina skíggjamynd av tínum skapanarverki.
Tíðin er um at vera uppi!

source_string: This demo will last 5 in-game days (about 1 hour and 40 minutes of real time). Check the achievements for hints! Have fun!
translation: Sýnisroyndin varar 5 spælidagar (umleið 1 tíma og 40 minuttir í veruleikanum). Fá góð ráð við at hyggja at framstigum! Góðan spælihug!

source_string: Use %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s and the mouse to move around
translation: Brúka %1$s, %2$s, %3$s, %4$s og músina at flyta teg við.
Hygg rundan um teg við músini

source_string: The demo time has expired, buy the game to continue or start a new world!
translation: Sýnisroyndin er útgingin. Keyp spælið, um tú vilt halda fram ella byrja ein nýggjan heim!

source_string: Are you sure you want to lock the difficulty of this world? This will set this world to always be %1$s, and you will never be able to change that again.
translation: Vilt tú veruliga steingja torleikastigið á heiminum? So verður heimurin altíð settur til %1$s, og tú fært ikki broyt tað aftur.

source_string: You were kicked from the game
You were kicked from the game:

translation: Ógildug seta (Royn at endurbyrja spælið og startaran)

source_string: The authentication servers are currently down for maintenance.
translation: Góðkenningarambætarar eru ikki tøkir í løtuni. Royn aftur seinni.
Tveitt/ur út fyri at senda fras

context: Label on the first tile button in the servers grid

source_string: Are you sure you want to remove this server?

context: How To Play help text header. {MaxLength="80"}

translation: Trýst á :_input_key.sneak: fyri at stíga av.

Light Gray Per Bend Sinister Inverted

source_string: This server recommends the use of a custom resource pack.
translation: Hesin ambætari viðmælir, at tú brúkar tillagaðar tilfeingispakkar.

source_string: Would you like to download and install it automagically?
translation: Vilt tú taka niður og leggja tað inn sjálvgandandi?
Spyr áðrenn leinki verða latin upp

source_string: Language translations may not be 100% accurate
translation: Týðingar eru kanska ikki heilt 100%% beinraknar

will be lost forever! (A long time!)
